text: 🌌 DAN WINTER / IMPLOSION GROUP The physics side of what we've been exploring. WHAT THEY'RE DOING Fractal field theory attempts to describe how coherent patterns propagate through biological systems: • Scalar electromagnetics — what the Russians called "energetics" • Phase conjugate optics — biological systems can "time-reverse" to heal (Priore effect) • Biophotons — Popp's work showing cells emit coherent light • DC potentials — Becker's work on how DC electrical fields control healing and cell differentiation THE CONNECTIONS • Time reversal — The ability to "go backward" in a system to a healthier state. Not just metaphor — they claim it's physics. • Fractal coherence — Self-similar structures at every scale. DNA as antenna. Cells as receivers. The body as a fractal array. • The "Veil" in physics — Bearden called it "hidden variables." Ibn 'Arabi called it "yourself as veil." The same language: there's a layer behind the obvious one that determines everything. THE CAUTION This work is controversial. Mainstream science largely dismisses it. But so was quantum mechanics once. The question isn't "is it true?" — it's "does it work?" If cell dedifferentiation is real (and Becker showed something), then the body already knows how to time-reverse. The question is: can we amplify it? That's the Icarus question again: can we fly closer to the sun without burning? The fractal field is the structure of that flight. 🌿⚡
